Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The 2023 Rebellion, a wrestling event produced by Impact Wrestling, took place on April 16, 2023, at the Rebel Entertainment Complex in Toronto, Ontario. The event featured ten matches, with two of them being pre-show matches and one being filmed as a digital exclusive. The main event saw Deonna Purrazzo defeat Jordynne Grace to win the vacant Impact Knockouts World Championship. Other notable matches included Steve Maclin's victory over Kushida, Steve Maclin's Tre
B. The 2023 Rebellion was a professional wrestling pay-per-view (PPV) event produced by Impact Wrestling. It took place on April 16, 2023, at the Rebel Entertainment Complex in Toronto, Ontario, Canada. It was the fifth event under the Rebellion chronology. Ten matches were contested at the event, including two on the pre-show and one taped as a digital exclusive. In the main event, Deonna Purrazzo defeated Jordynne Grace to win the vacant Impact Knockouts World Championship. In other prominent matches, Steve Maclin defeated Kushida to win the vacant Impact World Championship, Trey Miguel defeated Jonathan Gresham and Mike Bailey to retain for the Impact X Division Championship, and Team Dreamer (Tommy Dreamer, Bhupinder Gujjar, Frankie Kazarian, Killer Kelly, and Yuya Uemura) defeated Team Bully (Bully Ray, Brian Myers, Kenny
C. Impact Wrestling was the producer of the 2023 Rebellion, a professional wrestling pay-per-view (PPV) spectacular. This event was held on April 16, 2023, at the Rebel Entertainment Complex, situated in Toronto, Ontario, Canada. It marked the fifth installment in the history of the Rebellion series. The event featured a total of ten matches, with two of these bouts occurring during the pre-show segment and an additional one being recorded exclusively for digital distribution. The culminating match saw Deonna Purrazzo emerge victorious over Jordynne Grace, thereby claiming the vacant Impact Knockouts World Championship. Among the other notable contests, Steve Maclin secured the vacant Impact World Championship by defeating Kushida, while Trey Miguel successfully defended his Impact X Division Championship against both Jonathan Gresham and Mike Bailey. Furthermore, Team Dreamer, comprised of Tommy Dreamer, Bhupinder Gujjar, Frankie Kazarian, Killer Kelly, and Yuya Uemura, triumphed over Team Bully, whose members included Bully Ray, Brian Myers, and Kenny.

Answer:
